app.name: Fundez
cookies.message: We use essential cookies to run Fundez securely.
landing.hero.subtitle: Individuals and companies in Santiago: verified technicians, real-time tracking and Chile's only digital Home Passport.
landing.invite.credit: Code {{code}} — $5,000 credit when you sign up
landing.feature.passport: Home Passport — technical history of your property
landing.feature.card: Card payment — debit or credit, securely
landing.feature.guardian: Guardian Mode — your family follows the service without the app
landing.partner_body: Companies, technicians and independent professionals: receive verified jobs in your area, get paid for your services and grow with a community that values punctuality and great service.
about.title: Service with punctuality, excellence and heart
about.slogan: On time, with care, for those who need it most
about.image_alt: Plumber smiling with an elderly woman at her home after completing a repair
about.image_caption: Every visit is a promise kept: arrive on time, work with respect, and leave peace of mind in every home.
about.mission_body: Fundez was created to connect Santiago homes with verified technicians who deliver punctual, transparent and human service. We believe fixing a faucet, outlet or pipe is not just a repair — it is restoring peace of mind to a family, a grandmother alone at home, or anyone who trusts us when they need it most.
about.pillar_time_body: We coordinate every visit with precision so the technician arrives when promised.
about.pillar_quality_body: Verified work, respectful treatment and clear standards on every service.
about.pillar_community_body: We serve neighborhoods, families and neighbors with a commitment to care for what matters most: the home.
about.promise_body: Behind every request is a person waiting for a solution. That is why we built a platform the community can trust:
about.promise_1: Verified technicians and partners before attending any service
about.promise_2: Real-time tracking for families and beneficiaries
about.promise_3: Clear, human support when something does not go as expected
about.promise_4: A service standard that honors those who open their home to us
auth.remember_password: Save email and password on this device
auth.consent: I accept the Privacy Policy and Terms
consent.section_hint: You must accept the required documents to create your account.
consent.terminos: I accept the Terms and Conditions
consent.privacidad: I have read and accept the Privacy Policy
consent.tratamiento_cuenta: I authorize processing of my data to create and manage my account, authentication and support
consent.camara: I authorize use of the device camera to photograph the service, verify identity and visually document the work
consent.microfono: I authorize use of the microphone for voice communication with clients, partners and team during services
consent.marketing: I want to receive news and promotions (optional, revocable)
consent.kyc: I authorize processing of sensitive data for identity verification (ID and facial biometrics), under Law 21.719
verify.title: Verify your email
verify.subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to
verify.hint: The code expires in 15 minutes. Check spam or promotions.
verify.gmail_hint: Gmail: search from:soporte@fundez.cl or check Spam and the Promotions tab. Then tap Resend code.
verify.hotmail_hint: If you use Outlook/Hotmail, check Junk and the Other folder. The first email can take a few minutes.
verify.exists_resent: An account with this email already existed but was not verified. We sent a new code.
register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Join Fundez
register.subtitle_full: Join Fundez in under a minute
register.role_label: I want to sign up as
register.name: Full name
register.client_billing_hint: Individuals and companies must enter a valid Chilean RUT for billing and verification.
register.client_rut_hint: We verify the Chilean RUT check digit.
register.error_client_rut_invalid: The tax ID (RUT) is not valid. Check the number and check digit.
register.error_company_rut_invalid: The company tax ID (RUT) is not valid.
register.error_rep_rut_invalid: The legal representative tax ID (RUT) is not valid.
register.commune_hint: First choose the district where your address is located.
register.commune_selected: District: {{name}}. Now enter street and number.
register.address_hint: Type street and number, pick the suggestion, then tap the map or use your location to mark the exact entrance.
register.address_provider_hint: Type street and number, pick the suggestion and drag the blue pin to the exact entrance.
register.address_pin_drag_hint: Approximate location. Tap the map or drag the blue pin to your exact entrance.
register.address_pin_adjusted: Location adjusted. Make sure the pin is on your entrance.
register.address_map_tap_hint: Tap the map where your entrance is, or use your current location.
register.address_gps_error: We could not get your location. Adjust the pin manually.
register.address_unit_hint: This identifies the exact door inside the building, condominium or property.
register.address_no_results: No results. Try street and number.
register.address_search_fail: Could not search addresses. Please try again.
register.validation_address_select: Select your exact address from the suggestion list.
register.error_incomplete: Please enter your name, email and password.
register.error_password_short: Password must be at least 10 characters.
register.error_email_exists: An account with this email already exists.
register.error_email_exists_login: An account with this email already exists. Sign in with your password or use another email.
register.error_email_exists_hint: If you have not verified your email yet, sign in with the same password and we will send a new code.
register.error_email_exists_unverified: An account with this email already exists but is not verified yet. We sent a new code.
register.error_address_required: Enter the address where we will provide the service.
register.error_address_select: Select your exact address from the suggestion list.
register.error_address_street_number: Address must include street and number; pick an exact map option.
register.error_address_unit_required: Enter the house, apartment or office number.
register.error_address_mismatch: The pin is too far from the indicated street. Drag it to your entrance or pick the address again.
register.error_consents: You must accept the Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy.
register.error_generic: We could not create your account. Check your details and try again.
register.specialties_hint: Choose the services your company offers.
register.provider_hint: After email verification, go to your profile to activate your account: you’ll upload documents, complete verification and sign the partner contract there.
register.company_section_hint: Legal entity information for your Fundez partner registration.
register.company_docs_hint: Upload clear photos or PDFs (max. 6 MB each). All documents are required.
register.doc_incorporation_deed_hint: Public deed or authorized extract with partners, purpose and management.
register.doc_company_rut_hint: Tax ID certificate for the legal entity, not the representative.
register.doc_company_vigency_hint: Issued by Business Registry or notary (max. 60 days old).
register.doc_powers_vigency_hint: Proves the legal representative has current signing authority.
register.doc_rep_id_front_hint: Clear photo without cropping. Must match the declared tax ID.
register.doc_rep_id_back_hint: Address and expiration date must be visible.
register.error_rep_rut: Enter the legal representative tax ID.
register.error_provider_docs: Upload all required documents: incorporation, RUT, validity certificates and representative ID.
register.doc_file_too_large: Invalid file or larger than 6 MB.
register.validation_required: Complete this field to create an account.
register.validation_password: The password must be at least 10 characters.
client.requests_paused_desc: Service requests are not available at this time.
provider.status_offline_sub: Go online to see the wall
provider.no_services_active: No active services. Add them in My team with ready technicians.
provider.work_wall_hint: Requests available for your active services. You must be online and have a technician with a complete dossier. First to accept gets it.
provider.work_wall_preview_hint: You’ll see a short preview (photo and description). Open View details for full photos before taking the job.
provider.no_requests_desc: Go online. If you already are, check My team for a technician with a complete dossier. Paid jobs (searching) appear here live.
admin.login.subtitle: Restricted access for the administration team
admin.modulos.title: Platform modules
admin.modulos.hint: Enable or disable features for clients and partners. Changes apply instantly across the app.
admin.cobertura.title: Territorial coverage
admin.cobertura.hint: First enable a region with the checkbox. Then select communes where Fundez can receive requests. Default: Metropolitan Region with Providencia, Las Condes and Ñuñoa.
admin.cobertura.communes_hint: Check communes enabled within the active region.
coverage.not_available: We are working to reach your commune.
coverage.region_disabled: We do not operate in this region yet.
coverage.unknown_commune: We could not confirm your commune.
coverage.provider_not_available: Check the communes enabled for service.
coverage.provider_region_disabled: Check the communes enabled for service.
coverage.provider_unknown_commune: Check the communes enabled for service.
admin.servicios.title: Service control
admin.js.password_hint: Leave blank to keep current password.
admin.js.no_kb: No entries. Sync or add manually.

services.electrico.name: Electrical
services.electrico.desc: Installations, short circuits, panels and electrical emergencies.
services.gasfiter.name: Plumbing
services.gasfiter.desc: Leaks, pipes, faucets and drain clearing in bathroom and kitchen.
services.cerrajero.name: Locksmith
services.cerrajero.desc: Door opening, lock replacement and key copies.
services.termos.name: Water heater repair
services.termos.desc: Maintenance, element replacement and electric heater repair.
services.lavavajillas.name: Dishwasher
services.lavavajillas.desc: Pump repair, leaks and wash cycle issues.
services.lavadora.name: Washing machine
services.lavadora.desc: Spin, drain, drum and electronic board repair.
services.calderas.name: Building boilers
services.calderas.desc: Maintenance, calibration, pumps, burners and central boiler safety.
services.generadores.name: Generator maintenance
services.generadores.desc: Preventive maintenance, load tests, transfer systems and generator set repairs.

error.not_found.title: Not found
error.not_found.message: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
error.connecting.title: Connecting…
error.connecting.message: Fundez is connecting to the database. Wait a few seconds and reload the page.
error.internal.title: Internal error
error.internal.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again in a few seconds.
error.lost.headline: Got lost?
error.lost.punchline: If you take a wrong turn, call fundez.cl
error.lost.hook: We always know how to reach your home.
error.lost.slogan.0: 404 on the web. Zero drama at home.
error.lost.slogan.1: Wrong route → technician on the way.
error.lost.slogan.2: Lost here? Fundez won't leave you hanging.
error.lost.slogan.3: Your pipes won't wait. Neither do we.
error.lost.slogan.4: Wrong link. We still show up at your door.
error.lost.tip.2: Home Passport — digital history of your property
error.lost.tip.3: Guardian Mode — family follows the service without the app
error.lost.whatsapp_msg: Hi Fundez, I got lost on the website and need help with a home service.
error.system.punchline: While we're back, remember: fundez.cl always answers.
provider.verification_hint: To go online, complete verification in your profile (ID, face and location) and the contract with legal documents.
provider.contract_hint: In your profile and Contract, upload legal documents and sign. Fundez will review them before activating you.
